summary: Financial reports export (PDF + CSV) feature fully tested. Backend API tests all passed (13/13). Frontend export buttons working after bug fix. Fixed critical bug where downloadFinancialReport was using apiRequest which doesn't support blob() method.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - PDF and CSV export buttons working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial report export feature is complete. PDF and CSV buttons on /admin/finanzas page work correctly. Backend endpoint GET /api/finanzas/report supports format=pdf|csv and optional period=YYYY-MM filter. Authorization properly restricts to Admin/SuperAdmin only (Resident and Guard get 403).

backend_api: GET /api/finanzas/report?format=csv - Returns valid CSV with BOM, headers, summary - PASSED
GET /api/finanzas/report?format=pdf - Returns valid PDF (starts with %PDF-) - PASSED
Resident CANNOT access report endpoint (403) - PASSED
Guard CANNOT access report endpoint (403) - PASSED
Unauthenticated CANNOT access report endpoint (403) - PASSED
frontend_ui: PDF export button visible on /admin/finanzas - VERIFIED
CSV export button visible on /admin/finanzas - VERIFIED
Clicking PDF button triggers download with 'PDF descargado' toast - VERIFIED
Clicking CSV button triggers download with 'CSV descargado' toast - VERIFIED

bug_fixed.description: downloadFinancialReport function in api.js was using apiRequest which returns a custom response object without blob() method
bug_fixed.root_cause: apiRequest uses XMLHttpRequest and returns a custom response object with json() and text() methods but not blob()
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed to use native window.fetch() for blob downloads which properly supports the blob() method
